# Pull Request

## 📋 Description

Provide a clear summary of the changes and the problem they solve.

**Related Issue:** #(issue number)

## 🧪 Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that breaks existing functionality)
- [ ] Design/UI update
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Build/dependency update

## ✅ Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in complex areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors

### Testing

- [ ] I have tested on **desktop** (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
- [ ] I have tested on **mobile** (iOS, Android)
- [ ] I have tested both **light and dark themes**
- [ ] All existing functionality works as expected

### Commit Hygiene

- [ ] My commits are atomic and have descriptive messages
- [ ] I have not committed unnecessary files (node_modules, .env, etc.)

### Legal & Licensing

- [ ] I affirm that my contributions are original
- [ ] I understand that this project is proprietary (Appriyo Proprietary License)
- [ ] I have the right to contribute this code under the project's license

## 📸 Visual Changes (if UI-related)

Attach screenshots or recordings showing before/after:

| Before  | After   |
| ------- | ------- |
| (image) | (image) |

## 🧠 Additional Context

Any additional information for reviewers (dependencies, setup notes, edge cases, etc.)

---

## 📝 Reviewer Notes

- **Primary Reviewer:** @Shahjalal-Mahmud (Development)
- **Design Reviewer:** @Preota (for UI changes)
- **QA:** @Md-Munna-Sardar (will verify after merge)
